title: CDVT More Mob Heads
description:
Mod extends VanillaTweaks' concept of More Mob Heads making them drop from charged creepers.

Credits:
Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/
body:
# Creepers drop Vanilla Tweaks' More Mob Heads

Mod extends VanillaTweaks' concept of More Mob Heads making them drop from charged creepers. Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).

# Credits:
Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/
